outreach_subject: Re: A European angle on your insurance commissioner piece

replies.subject: RE: [EXT] Re: A European angle on your insurance commissioner piece
replies.body:
Hi Lisa:

Not clear what piece you are referencing, but I suggest reaching out to the reporter responsible for the coverage. Our email constructions are all the same. Just check the byline and use the first initial + surname @kqed.org. Just like my email address.

I am not part of the editorial staff. Good luck. - Peter

-----Original Message-----
From: Lisa Monelli <info@myvilla.la> 
Sent: Sunday, June 28, 2026 2:41 AM
To: Peter Cavagnaro <pcavagnaro@KQED.org>
Subject: [EXT] Re: A European angle on your insurance commissioner piece

EXTERNAL

Hi team,

Apologies if my note from last week got buried. One figure that might be worth having on hand: insurance carriers still writing in CA WUI ZIP codes are underwriting concrete-shell homes meaningfully cleaner than wood frame, and that gap is now showing up in renewal cycles — not just new policies. Happy to share the underlying data if it's useful for an upcoming piece.

Best,
Lisa Monelli
My Villa Media Team
info@myvilla.la · myvilla.la
